ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Instrumento tra alcuni academici et ministri interessati
ItacWorkItem.Content: Agreement for the formation of the Academia veneziana, with functions and obligations of interested parties
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The document starts with the date 14 November 1557.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
